cards.back: A tree data structure used to represent the possible moves and their outcomes in a game
An optimization technique used in Minimax algorithm to reduce the number of nodes to be evaluated
A mathematical system that undergoes transitions from one state to another, where the probability of transitioning from one state to another is dependent on the current state
A subfield of artificial intelligence that deals with the interaction between computers and humans in natural language
A recursive algorithm used in game playing to find the best move by considering all possible moves and their outcomes
